name: kingambit
flavor_texts: Only a Bisharp that stands above all others in its vast army can evolve into Kingambit.
Though it commands a massive army in battle, it’s not skilled at devising complex strategies. It just uses brute strength to keep pushing.
text: Kingambit is the Big Blade Pokémon. It is a dark and steel-type Pokémon. Abilities: defiant, supreme-overlord, pressure (hidden). Base stats — HP: 100, Attack: 135, Defense: 120, Sp. Atk: 60, Sp. Def: 85, Speed: 50. Evolution line: pawniard → bisharp → kingambit. Lore: Only a Bisharp that stands above all others in its vast army can evolve into Kingambit. Though it commands a massive army in battle, it’s not skilled at devising complex strategies. It just uses brute strength to keep pushing.
